name: @quoin/tokens-shadcn
description: shadcn/ui default theme (zinc, OKLCH) translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Default 'zinc' theme variables from the shadcn/ui themes registry. shadcn/ui ships CSS custom properties named --background, --foreground, --muted, etc.; these are renamed onto the Quoin canonical namespace.
